wine_hotels.name: Castello Banfi Il Borgo
wine_hotels.address: Castello di Poggio alle Mura 1, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Relais and Chateaux property fashioned from an 18th-century borgo on the working Castello Banfi wine estate. Tastings, vineyard and cellar tours with the sommelier; two restaurants including Michelin-starred La Sala dei Grappoli.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Banfi Brunello di Montalcino vertical tastings; harvest participation (September-October); blending workshops with the cellar team

verified.address_quoted: Castello di Poggio alle Mura, 1, Montalcino, Italy 53024

wine_hotels.name: Borgo San Felice
wine_hotels.address: Localita San Felice, 53019 Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Medieval Chianti Classico hamlet restored into a Relais and Chateaux resort. Michelin-starred Il Poggio Rosso restaurant with 500-bottle cellar; Osteria del Grigio for informal Tuscan dining; estate winery and vineyard tours.
wine_hotels.wine_program: San Felice Chianti Classico Riserva and Vigorello Super Tuscan vertical tastings; harvest participation; pairing dinners with the winemaker

wine_hotels.name: COMO Castello del Nero
wine_hotels.address: Strada Spicciano 7, 50028 Tavarnelle Val di Pesa, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Luxury hotel inside a 12th-century castle in Chianti Classico between Florence and Siena. La Torre restaurant under chef Giovanni Luca Di Pirro and a wine programme covering the Chianti Classico consortium.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Chianti Classico estate masterclasses; cooking and wine pairing workshops; private cellar dinners

verified.address_quoted: Strada Spicciano, 7, 50028, Tavarnelle Val di Pesa

wine_hotels.name: Borgo Scopeto Wine and Country Relais
wine_hotels.address: Localita Scopeto, Vagliagli, 53019 Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Country relais on the Castelnuovo Berardenga estate of the Borgo Scopeto wine producer. Restored 16th-century farm buildings amid Chianti Classico vineyards with a pool, tennis courts, and guided cellar visits at the estate winery.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Borgo Scopeto Chianti Classico estate tastings; vineyard walks and pairing lunches with the winemaker

wine_hotels.name: Castello di Casole A Belmond Hotel
wine_hotels.description: Belmond-owned 1000-year-old estate spanning 4,200 acres west of Siena. Organic vineyards across 25 acres in 13 distinct plots producing the Ulpaia private-label Cabernet, Sangiovese, Merlot and Petit Verdot wines.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Ulpaia estate vertical tastings; vineyard tours and harvest experience; blending workshops with the estate team

wine_hotels.name: Villa il Poggiale Dimora Storica
wine_hotels.address: Via Empolese 69, 50026 San Casciano in Val di Pesa, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Restored 16th-century villa in Chianti Classico just south of Florence. Family-run; vineyard and olive grove walks plus cellar tastings of neighbouring estates including Antinori and Castello di Cigliano.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Chianti Classico cellar tastings with neighbouring producers; cooking class with wine-pairing component

verified.address_quoted: Via Empolese 69, 50026, San Casciano in Val di Pesa

wine_hotels.name: Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco
wine_hotels.address: Localita Castiglion del Bosco, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Rosewood resort on a 900-year-old Tuscan estate spanning 5,000+ acres in Val d'Orcia. Castiglion del Bosco is the fifth-largest Brunello di Montalcino producer; Michelin-starred Campo del Drago restaurant and cooking school onsite.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Castiglion del Bosco Brunello di Montalcino vertical tastings; harvest experience; cellar masterclasses with the winemaker

wine_hotels.name: Castello di Velona Resort Thermal SPA and Winery
wine_hotels.address: Localita La Velona, 53024 Montalcino, Siena, Italy
wine_hotels.description: 11th-century fortress with thermal hot springs in the Val d'Orcia, 8km from Montalcino. Five hectares of estate Brunello di Montalcino vineyards; restaurant menus paired with castle-produced wines.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Brunello di Montalcino tastings and pairing menus; Dine Around programme to neighbouring Michelin starred restaurants

wine_hotels.name: Il Borro Relais and Chateaux
wine_hotels.address: Localita Borro 1, 52024 San Giustino Valdarno, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Ferruccio Ferragamo's restored medieval village across 1,100 organic acres including 85 hectares of vineyards and 40 hectares of olive groves. Two restaurants including Osteria del Borro, four pools and a wine cellar.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Il Borro Toscana Super Tuscan tastings; organic vineyard tours; cooking classes with pairing component

wine_hotels.name: L'Andana Resort Tenuta La Badiola
wine_hotels.address: Localita Badiola, 58043 Castiglione della Pescaia, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Former hunting residence of Leopold II Grand Duke of Tuscany, now a Leading Hotels of the World property in the Maremma. Acquagiusta estate vineyards on site plus Michelin-starred Trattoria Enrico Bartolini.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Acquagiusta Maremma DOC tastings; horseback vineyard rides; harvest participation in September

wine_hotels.name: Foresteria Castello di Verrazzano
wine_hotels.address: Via Citille 32, 50022 Greve in Chianti, Italy
wine_hotels.description: Guesthouse rooms at the Castello di Verrazzano estate in Greve in Chianti, with terrace views over the organic Chianti Classico vineyards. Daily cellar visits, restaurant in the historic stables.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Castello di Verrazzano cellar tours; pairing lunches with estate wines; guided vineyard walks

wine_hotels.name: Frescobaldi CastelGiocondo Guesthouse
wine_hotels.description: Seven guest rooms within the medieval CastelGiocondo borgo on the Frescobaldi Brunello di Montalcino estate. Includes private cellar visits, cooking classes from the kitchen garden, and Lamaione Merlot vertical tastings.
wine_hotels.wine_program: CastelGiocondo Brunello and Lamaione Merlot verticals; in-cellar barrel tastings with winemaker
